untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) trading range formation with multiple support/resistance touches - requires pattern recognition not available in indicator set; (2) range duration measurement in bars - requires multi-bar range detection logic; (3) preceding trend clarity assessment on higher timeframe - requires multi-timeframe analysis not supported; (4) specific entry trigger distance from range edge - requires dynamic range boundary tracking. The core logic of 'positioning for trend continuation within a range structure' cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicators and basic operators. Bollinger Bands and volume ratio are proxies only.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using Bollinger Bands as proxy for range boundaries and volume confirmation. However, this signal fundamentally requires pattern recognition (range detection), multi-timeframe analysis, and dynamic threshold calculation that exceed the capability of the allowed indicator set. A proper implementation would need: (1) range_high/range_low tracking, (2) touch_count logic, (3) higher timeframe trend confirmation, (4) entry_distance_from_edge calculation. The CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction reflects that entries should be in the direction of the preceding trend, but this cannot be operationalized without trend detection logic.
